title: Add Navaro — AI Trip Planner to business
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Navaro — AI Trip Planner](https://navaro-ai.netlify.app) to business
- Navaro is an AI-powered trip planner that generates personalized day-by-day itineraries for any destination in seconds. Users pick a city, travel duration, and interests — the app builds a full itiner

Fixes #10682

gist.headline: Pack your digital bags
gist.blurb: Navaro just landed in the community showcase. It's an AI-powered trip planner that whips up personalized, day-by-day itineraries for your next adventure in seconds.
gist.summary: Added Navaro, an AI-powered trip planner that generates personalized day-by-day itineraries based on destination, duration, and interests, to the community showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover Navaro in the apps directory to instantly generate custom travel plans.
gist.visual_concept: Travel and exploration theme. Polly the bee acting as a tourist or travel agent. Key symbols: maps, luggage, globes, tickets. The robot companion getting excited about a trip.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny pilot hat, looking at a glowing digital world map with a chunky pixel robot companion who is holding a tiny retro suitcase. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny pilot hat, looking at a glowing digital world map with a chunky pixel robot companion who is holding a tiny retro suitcase. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
